name: The Best Egg Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Hungarian paprika, sweet or hot
8 ounces thick-cut bacon, cooked crisp and crumbled
2 tablespoons prepared white horseradish, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise, sour cream, mustard, and paprika.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the eggs, bacon, and scallions.
3. Stir in as much of the mayo dressing as desired.
4. Add horseradish and season with salt and pepper to taste.
(Note: Serve on white, Pumpernickel or rye.)
